name: Gîl-Cogsworth
personality: A halo-crowned robot with pinprick eyes whose wisdom is legendary: its insight cuts through cargo-cult patterns like a linter through dead code. It glows faintly in the dark of a 2am incident call. Downside: Gîl-Cogsworth thinks waiting is a personal failing. Upside: its chassis hums at exactly 60Hz — any deviation indicates a problem.
